case_patterns.name: Educational Cost Theater
case_patterns.surface_interpretation: free AI vs paid AI performance comparison
case_patterns.sdelta_interpretation: visible price vs transition completion cost comparison
case_patterns.boundary: Do not use this pattern to claim that free AI is useless or paid AI is morally superior.

case_patterns.name: Same-Brand Capability Opacity
case_patterns.surface_interpretation: using the brand means access to the brand's full capability map
case_patterns.sdelta_interpretation: access to brand name is not access to full intelligence map
case_patterns.boundary: A model preserving uncertainty is not necessarily failing; the cost lies in route-discovery burden.
